  • weekly picks (Jun 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 June 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    06/01

    1. 2605.30421v1 Topological Phenomena Protected by Diabolical Textures (arXiv)

    2. 2605.30495v1 Kinetic phase transition modeling for metals (arXiv)

    3. 2605.30575v1 Observation and Control of the Magnetic Photogalvanic Effect from Strongly Bound Excitons (arXiv)

    4. 2605.30584v1 Symmetry-Resolved Second Harmonic Generation in Quantum and Functional Materials (arXiv)

    5. 2605.30627v1 Deterministic fabrication of large-area, high-crystallinity oxide moire superlattices (arXiv)

    6. 2605.30682v1 Simulations of dislocation dynamics on an atomic lattice: the effect of collision rules (arXiv)

    7. 2605.30735v1 Tensor gradient flow for rod-like liquid crystals from molecular model with closure approximation by quasi-entropy (arXiv)

    8. 2605.30746v1 Superconductor-“Metal” Transition of One-dimensional Interacting Bosons with Ohmic Quantum Dissipation (arXiv)

    9. 2605.30752v1 Ni-O hybridization-driven electronic reconstruction across the superconducting dome in an infinite-layer nickelate (arXiv)

    10. 2605.30760v1 Bending-like stress induced by solder joint under uniaxial tensile testing in 2G-HTS tapes: Impact and optimization approach (arXiv)

    11. 2605.30822v1 Using graph neural networks to predict many-body interactions in amorphous materials (arXiv)

    12. 2605.30847v1 Terahertz Electrodynamics and Kinetic Inductance of Disordered Titanium-Vanadium Alloy Thin Films (arXiv)

    13. 2605.30868v1 Living Helices in Fluctuating Polymer Chains: Cooperative Nucleation, Dynamics, and Lifetime (arXiv)

    14. 2605.30881v1 Spin Hall effect in two-dimensional materials with inverted bands and Mexican-hat dispersion (arXiv)

    15. 2605.30887v1 Activity-Enhanced Ordering in Fluctuation-Induced First-Order Transitions (arXiv)

    16. 2605.30909v1 Pure Spin Photocurrent in Altermagnetic Photovoltaic Battery (arXiv)

    17. 2605.30948v1 Competing heterogeneities shape ordering via higher-order interactions (arXiv)

    18. 2605.30978v1 Parity-induced generalized Brillouin zone without non-Hermitian skin effect (arXiv)

    19. 2605.30986v1 Dimensionality of a strongly interacting 2D-3D Fermi-Fermi mixture from the perspective of superfluid instability and excitation properties (arXiv)

    20. 2605.31037v1 Spin-Spiral Enhancement of Ultrafast Light-Polarization-Robust Magnetization (arXiv)

    21. 2605.31078v1 Finite-inertia effects in Langevin dynamics of a lopsided elastic dumbbell using exponential-time differencing schemes (arXiv)

    22. 2605.31107v1 Clustering in atom probe tomography data: coordination number metric, percolation-based parameter scaling, and size effects (arXiv)

    23. 2605.31112v1 Functional methods for quantum thermodynamics (arXiv)

    24. 2605.31118v1 Complex Magnetic Behavior of the Ce sawtooth chains in CeRhSn$_2$ (arXiv)

    25. 2605.31144v1 A Self-Evolving Machine-Learning-Based Kinetic Monte Carlo Method for Modelling Thin-Film Growth (arXiv)

    26. 2605.31166v1 The geometry of the CISS effect (arXiv)

    27. 2605.31185v1 A charge qubit on solid neon in a spin-qubit compatible circuit QED platform (arXiv)

    28. 2605.31195v1 Topological Interstitial-Electron Conductor (arXiv)

    29. 2605.31197v1 Surface lone-pair polarization probed by quantum-geometric transport in tellurium (arXiv)

    30. 2605.31207v1 Cover time statistics of one-dimensional Brownian motion under stochastic resetting (arXiv)

    31. 2605.31240v1 Emergence of spin entanglement with the pseudogap onset in the Fermi-Hubbard model (arXiv)

    32. 2605.31252v1 Magnetic domains reconfiguration on the Fe3O4(110) surface across the Verwey transition by Spin-Polarized Low-Energy Electron Microscopy (arXiv)

    33. 2605.31258v1 Droplets sitting on thin elastic sheets: A study with the boundary element method (arXiv)

    34. 2605.31263v1 Valley-polarized Orbital and Spin Magnetism Induced by Femtosecond Optical Pulses in Two-Dimensional Semiconductors (arXiv)

    35. 2605.31303v1 A Practical Guide for Diagnosing Imaginary Phonon Modes in Metal–Organic Frameworks: The Case of MOF-5 (arXiv)

    36. 2605.31307v1 Feasibility study of continuous electronic Pomeranchuk cooling with a flavor-degenerate Wigner crystal (arXiv)

    37. 2605.31342v1 Co-optimization of spin coherence and valley splitting in Si/SiGe heterostructures (arXiv)

    38. 2605.31395v1 Direct Observation of Chemical Short-Range Order in CoCrNi Alloy Using Neutron Diffraction (arXiv)

    39. 2605.31447v1 Strain-Engineered s-C$_3$N$_6$ Monolayer for Efficient Water Splitting: A first-principles study (arXiv)

    40. 2605.31459v1 What controls the superconducting dome of electron-doped FeSe? (arXiv)

    41. 2605.31462v1 Cooperative Conformational Transitions in Macromolecules under Mechanical Stretching. An Exactly Solved Model for Single Molecule Experiments (arXiv)

    42. 2605.31467v1 Ab Initio Spinor Kadanoff-Baym Approach to Nonequilibrium Electron, Phonon and Magnon Dynamics in Itinerant Ferromagnets (arXiv)

    43. 2605.31501v1 Kohn-Luttinger Superconductivity of Weyl Fermi Arcs in PtBi$_2$ (arXiv)

    44. 2605.31532v1 Discovering Thermodynamically Admissible Dissipation Potentials via Grammar-Based Symbolic Regression (arXiv)

    45. 2605.31537v1 Nonperturbative renormalization of Haldane pseudopotentials from the exact two-electron spectrum (arXiv)

    46. 2605.31592v1 Floquet Engineering of Quantum Transport through two Driven Impurities (arXiv)

    47. 2605.31601v1 Twin Phases: Phase Transitions Without Hidden Symmetry Breaking (arXiv)

    48. 2605.30425v1 Dually tunable YBCO coplanar waveguide resonators based on helium-ion-generated Josephson inductances (arXiv)

    49. 2605.30768v1 Geometric dependence of critical-current variation in Al/AlO${\rm _x}$/Al Josephson junctions: a model-based analysis (arXiv)

    50. 2605.31009v1 Explicit Turn Resolution with Anisotropic Homogenisation for Efficient 3D Magneto-Thermal Finite-Element Simulation of Large-Scale No-Insulation HTS Magnets (arXiv)

    51. 2605.31350v1 Optimisation and Precision Tuning of Localised Surface Plasmon Resonance in AuFON Systems (arXiv)

    52. 2605.31374v1 Multi-point functions of a full-plane two-state fuzzy $4$-Potts model (arXiv)

    53. 2605.31472v1 (Non-)Traversable Quantum Phase Transitions (arXiv)
